hypothesis: Given that GFN1-xTB systematically underestimates band gaps for MOFs containing 3d transition metals (Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni) due to inadequate treatment of d-electron correlation and strong correlation effects, training a separate Δ-learning model exclusively on this transition metal subset using DFT+U or hybrid functional corrections will yield significantly lower prediction errors than the current universal Δ-learning approach for these challenging materials.
